items.title: Arrays & Lists
items.description: Lists give O(1) random access but O(n) inserts in the middle; linked lists flip those trade-offs.

items.title: Stacks & Queues
items.description: collections.deque (the right queue in Python) is a doubly-linked list of memory blocks.

items.title: Hash Tables
items.description: Python's dict and OrderedDict combine a hash table with a linked list to preserve insertion / access order.

items.title: collections & dataclasses
items.description: deque, OrderedDict and ChainMap are the linked-list-flavored containers shipped with Python.
